name: browser-agent-guide
description: Guardrails that keep browser-operating AIs on track — a Chrome side-panel agent that drives any page through a closed, deterministic verb registry using Structured Outputs.
author: buddypia

scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:markers && npm test && npm run test:slug && npm run test:recipe && npm run test:vf && npm run test:ui
scripts.check:js: for f in content/content-script.js sidepanel/sidepanel.js sidepanel/i18n.js background/service-worker.js lib/ai-client.js lib/prompt.js lib/storage.js lib/site-matcher.js lib/slug.js lib/recipe-merge.js lib/visual-feedback/compositor.js offscreen/offscreen.js options/options.js scripts/check-agent-markers.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'syntax OK'
